actions.text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.

official_title: To amend the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 to prohibit funds under such Act from being provided to public elementary and secondary schools that provide counseling, therapy, or guidance related to gender identity to students under 18 years of age, and for other purposes.
short_title: Stop Secret Counseling of Students Act

titles.title: Stop Secret Counseling of Students Act
Stop Secret Counseling of Students Act

To amend the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 to prohibit funds under such Act from being provided to public elementary and secondary schools that provide counseling, therapy, or guidance related to gender identity to students under 18 years of age, and for other purposes.
